---
title: "Blog | Ayel L. R. Batac"
title-block: false
canonical-url: https://ayelbatac.github.io/blog
description: "Explore blog posts by Ayel L. R. Batac with reflections on global health and knowledge translation in public health research."

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-links: false
---

# BLOG

<p style="color: #1B153E; font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 1.5rem;">Latest Posts</p>

<ul style="list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-top: 1rem;">

  <!-- Blog Post 5 (Most Recent) -->
  <li style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <a href="guidelines-global-acess-structural-gaps-anaphylaxis-treatment.qmd" style="color: #1B153E; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;" 
       onmouseover="this.style.color='#DE2221'" 
       onmouseout="this.style.color='#1B153E'">
      Guidelines Are Global. Access Is Not: Structural Gaps in Anaphylaxis Treatment
    </a>
    <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;">Published: Mar 10, 2026</div>
  </li>
  
  <!-- Blog Post 4 -->
  <li style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <a href="syphilis-self-testing.qmd" style="color: #1B153E; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;" 
       onmouseover="this.style.color='#DE2221'" 
       onmouseout="this.style.color='#1B153E'">
      Syphilis Self-Testing: Access Is the Intervention
    </a>
    <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;">Published: Jan 2, 2026</div>
  </li>
  
  <!-- Blog Post 3 -->
  <li style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <a href="u-equals-u.qmd" style="color: #1B153E; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;" 
       onmouseover="this.style.color='#DE2221'" 
       onmouseout="this.style.color='#1B153E'">
      U = U: The Science, the Message, and Why It Matters
    </a>
    <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;">Published: May 23, 2025</div>
  </li>

  <!-- Blog Post 2 -->
  <li style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <a href="sti-talk.qmd" style="color: #1B153E; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;" 
       onmouseover="this.style.color='#DE2221'" 
       onmouseout="this.style.color='#1B153E'">
      Let’s Talk About STIs: What They Are, Why They Matter, and What You Can Do
    </a>
    <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;">Published: May 10, 2025</div>
  </li>

  <!-- Blog Post 1 -->
  <li style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <a href="why-i-work-in-public-health.qmd" style="color: #1B153E; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;" 
       onmouseover="this.style.color='#DE2221'" 
       onmouseout="this.style.color='#1B153E'">
      Why I Work in Public Health: A Personal and Professional Journey
    </a>
    <div style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;">Published: May 7, 2025</div>
  </li>

</ul>
